reason: Codex companion runtime read the rubric and all three deliverables but did not emit a captured changelog or apply any edits within the harness time limit (two runs hit exit 144 timeout; a third returned exit 0 with no edits and no surfaced changelog). Not a confirmed completed review-and-fix pass, so codex_reviewed left false per skill rule. Fell back to a careful manual re-derivation: verified smaller-cluster=poison against IBM ART analyze_by_size (argmin of bincount), the scoring formula 10*membership + 1/(dist+eps) against the task edit.py, ICA-vs-PCA rationale and the Spectral Signatures ancestor math (top-singular-vector outlier score, eps-spectral-separability, 1.5*epsilon removal) against arXiv:1811.00636.
